'''鈭歾h-t-s-j''' ('''kazhatsejoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:jackass|jackass]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-t-s-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jackass|jackass]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歾h-t-s-j
|-
! Lemma
| kazhatsejoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizhatsejoko|thizhatsejoko]] || [[word:jizhatsejoko|jizhatsejoko]] || [[word:shizhatsejoko|shizhatsejoko]] || [[word:kizhatsejoko|kizhatsejoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thazhatsejoko|thazhatsejoko]] || [[word:jazhatsejoko|jazhatsejoko]] || [[word:shazhatsejoko|shazhatsejoko]] || [[word:kazhatsejoko|kazhatsejoko]]
|-

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

|-
